cases.title: Pipeline main exposes raw loop iteration snapshots as public array output
notes: Loop results are per-iteration step snapshots, not the projected item output.
Pipeline main assembly must add a projection step before exposing a public array contract.

cases.title: Pipeline invokes Copilot against a derived clone path that has not been proven to exist
notes: This is intentionally documented without adding server-specific Flow heuristics.
A future generic dataflow quality gate should require external-work consumers to depend on an explicit producing contract when existence is operationally required.
